# Wrap OK

## 1. Example

```python
this_code_line_is_deliberately_long_but_should_be_ignored_by_the_wrap_checker_because_it_is_inside_a_fenced_code_block = True
```

| Column A | Column B |
| --- | --- |
| value | this table row is deliberately long but should be ignored by the line wrap checker because it is a table |

See https://example.com/this/is/a/very/long/url/that/should/not/trigger/the/wrap/checker/because/it/is/a/url.
